remember: Students will be able to recall the elements of a formal letter.
Students will be able to identify the components of a formal letter.
Students will be able to list the salutations and closings used in formal letters.
understand: Students will be able to comprehend the purpose and tone of a formal letter.
Students will be able to explain the importance of formal language in a letter.
Students will be able to analyze the structure of a formal letter.
apply: Students will be able to write a formal letter using the correct salutations and closings.
Students will be able to compose a formal letter using proper formal language.
Students will be able to incorporate the necessary components of a formal letter into their writing.
analyze: Students will be able to evaluate the effectiveness of a formal letter in conveying a message.
Students will be able to compare the tone and language used in different types of formal letters.
Students will be able to identify the strengths and weaknesses of a formal letter.

ncert_objectives: To understand the basic elements of a formal letter.
To learn the various forms of address and the salutations used in formal letters.
To comprehend the structure of a formal letter and its essential components.
board_exam_objectives: To write an effective formal letter using the correct format and language.
To use the proper salutations and closings in a formal letter.
To demonstrate the ability to convey a message in a clear and concise manner using formal language.
